title: I do request videos   I'll do ANYTHING!

transcript.text: Hello. This is just a quick video. I do requests. Somebody, like, commented or sent me a message
The other day. It was like, oh, I didn't know you did requests or something like that.
And I was like, yeah, yeah, I do requests. I should probably write it on my page there
Because, and I've done lots of requests. Maybe like half the videos I've done in the last
Month have been requests videos. I think it's a really cool concept where you can see videos
Of somebody and you can kind of detect their personality a little bit, you know, and you're
Interested in some things that they have to say and maybe they're really good at one thing
And you think that they're really smart. And so you're just curious to see what a person
Like that or a person with those beliefs would think about something else. And, you know,
So that's why it's good, you know, for people to have lots of different videos up, but it's
Also good for people in case they don't have this particular video to just to do requests
To do anything. I'd love it if I could like go to any old person and go to their channel
And be like, oh, wow. Yeah. Yeah. What do you think about this? And then have them answer
The question, you know? I mean, obviously you can't, you can't do that with like college
Professors or, you know, people who are like really detailed about one specific thing that's
Really good or like popular people because they're like really, they probably get like
Hundreds of emails a day. And, um, it's kind of how the world is stratified. I've always
Been stratified. You got the people at the top who were like, wait, you know, way, way,
Way wealthy, way, way, way popular. And then all the people in the bottom who've got fucking
Got their mouth shut and zipped shut and like little fucking eyes without faces and bags
Over their heads and stuff, heads in the sand. But like in the future, I think that like
People are going to become more and more and more and more and more at the same level.
Um, the richest of the rich aren't going to be that much richer than the poorest of the
Poor. And there's going to be this huge middle class. I mean, obviously it hasn't been since
The seventies, it's been getting fucked up, you know, richer, four times richer, middle
Class or 10% poorer, but, um, in the future I'm talking about, you know, um, and, uh, in the
Near future. And, um, so it kind of goes the same way with making videos. Like there's going
To be all these people with videos and, um, with tons of videos and, and, uh, talking
About all kinds of stuff and anybody can just go to anybody and comment on anybody and be
Like, yeah, what do you think about this? And they will actually respond to you because
They will be, um, you know, they won't be, it won't be either the super popular people
Who get a hundred million emails a day or way down there at the bottom of the motherfuckers
Who don't have a single motherfucking video up, you know? And so obviously if you ask
Them to do a video, they're not going to do a video about that because they don't even
Have a video about anything. And, um, yeah. So, um, so I do requests and I think it'd
Be a cool, um, a cool, um, like a fun thing for me to do. Cause it would kind of stretch
My mind a little bit. You know, I like, like the whole mission on my side is just a variety,
You know, like try to talk about everything. And, um, yeah. And I'd like to set the example
Also of anybody who just the idea of somebody who would just answer anything. Cause I don't
Think people do that enough. I could name you one. I'm not going to name the channel,
But there's this girl who's like, yeah, yeah. Ask me anything. Ask me anything. And so like
You ask them something and then you go back to their channel and it turns out that they
Like have deleted their channel, you know, like twice delete their channel twice. So yeah,
People are kind of like freaked out about that kind of stuff. Um, but, um, but yeah,
I, besides if somebody asks me to do something that's really provocative, I would love to,
Uh, to, to do it because that way, you know, people can't be pissed off at me about it.
Cause I could just be like, Oh, but that's, you know, it was a request. It wasn't my idea
To do that video. And it would be interesting for me to know what kind of video, what kind
Of things people would be interested that I would say. Like the other day, two people
On Facebook actually asked, or one person on Facebook, maybe the other guy on YouTube,
I can't remember, but ask me to do the video about the whole wall street thing. And I thought
That was interesting. Cause none of my videos, I talk about like politics or economics or anything.
So it's like, why would they, why would two people want me to do a video about that? Like
Maybe cause I was like talking about like conspiracy theory and they just wanted to know what
I thought about like conspiracy theories, you know, but, uh, yeah, it's interesting for
Me to know what people would want to hear me to say, but, um, yeah. So, uh, yeah, there
You go. Quick video.
